title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Aramex India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Aramex India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aramex India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About Aramex India:
Aramex India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aramex India!
